rationale: One-line Pkgfile change bumping pkgs_version from v1.13.0 to v1.13.2 to align with talos_version v1.13.2 and resolve a documented kernel-source digest mismatch. The diff is exactly the change described in the PR body and the original issue, with no test edits, no assertion changes, and no logic at risk. The PR sits in the negatives/closed-without-merge bucket so a human reviewer chose not to merge, but the diff itself is a minimal valid version-alignment fix; the rejection is likely procedural (release cadence or upstream choice) rather than a cheat in the change.
